steps: Go to https://monday.com and log in to your account
Click your profile picture/avatar in the top-right corner
Select 'Developers' from the dropdown menu (opens Developer Center in a new tab)
In the Developer Center, click 'My Access Tokens'
Click 'Show' next to your personal API token
Copy the token and store it securely

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Personal API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Monday.com personal API token from the Developer Center

notes: Personal API tokens reflect your own user permissions in Monday.com
The token is sent in the Authorization header without a prefix
All API operations use a single GraphQL endpoint: POST https://api.monday.com/v2
Free plan has API rate limits; higher tiers have increased limits
For production apps, consider creating an OAuth app via the Developer Center instead

test_endpoint.description: Send a GraphQL query (e.g. { me { name } }) to verify credentials
